channel.title: LLM Timeline — Google Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Google.

item.title: TimesFM-ICF (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.2B License: closed Type: model TimesFM-ICF is 6.8% more accurate than TimesFM (Base). Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: TimesFM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.2B License: open Type: model Time-series forecasting only. 'a large pretraining corpus of 100B real world time-points' may be more than 100B tokens.

item.title: AudioPaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: closed Type: model a unified multimodal architecture that can process and generate text and speech with applications including speech recognition and speech-to-speech translation

item.title: PaLM 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: open Type: model “What we found in our work is that it’s not really the sort of size of model — that the larger is not always better,” Deepmind VP Zoubin Ghahramani said in a press briefing ahead of today’s announcement. “That’s why we’ve provided a family of models of different sizes. We think that actually parameter count is not really a useful way of thinking about the capabilities of models and capabilities are really to be judged by people using the models and finding out whether they’re useful in the tests that they try to achieve with these models.”

item.title: CoLT5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 5.2B License: closed Type: model up to 64k context window [48k words or about 96 pages -Alan]

item.title: RT-1 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.035B License: closed Type: model

item.title: Flan-T5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model T5=1T tokens + LM-adapted T5 as 100B tokens

item.title: Flan-PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: U-PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: PaLI (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 17B License: closed Type: model PaLM Vision model, new datasets of 10B multilingual text-image pairs

item.title: ‘monorepo-Transformer’ (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.5B License: closed Type: model Unnamed. Writes >3% of internal google code.

item.title: Minerva (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model PaLM finetuned on LaTeX/arXiv maths

item.title: LIMoE (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 5.6B License: closed Type: model

item.title: UL2 20B (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 20B License: closed Type: model Unifying Language model. C4 only.

item.title: LaMDA 2 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: partial Type: model Chatbot with tiny walled garden demo TBA

item.title: PaLM-Coder (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: PaLM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 540B License: closed Type: model

item.title: GLaM (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 1200B License: closed Type: model

item.title: BERT-480 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 480B License: closed Type: model Submission to benchmarks. Original dataset was BookCorpus + Wikipedia: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1810.04805.pdf

item.title: BERT-200 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 200B License: closed Type: model Submission to benchmarks. Original dataset was BookCorpus + Wikipedia: https://arxiv.org/pdf/1810.04805.pdf

item.title: FLAN (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: closed Type: model Fine-tuned LaMDA

item.title: LaMDA (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 137B License: closed Type: model Chatbot

item.title: Switch (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 1600B License: open Type: model

item.title: Meena (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 2.6B License: closed Type: model Dialogue model. Trained 61B tokens for 164x epochs to 10T tokens!

item.title: T5 (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model "Text-to-Text Transfer Transformer". C4 + NLP language problems. "compared the following three configurations: First, the standard baseline model, which was pre-trained on 235 ≈ 34B tokens; second, the baseline trained instead for about 1 trillion tokens (i.e. the same amount of pre-training used for T5), which we refer to as “baseline-1T”; and third, T5-Base."

item.title: BERT (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.34B License: open Type: model "BERT — 128 000 tokens per step × 1 000 000 steps → 128 B tokens processed"

item.title: Transformer (big) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.213B License: open Type: model "Transformer Big — 32 768 tokens per step × 300 000 steps → 9.83 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."

item.title: Transformer (base) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.065B License: open Type: model "Transformer Base — 32 768 tokens per step × 100 000 steps → 3.28 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."
